metric_name: Pools of Storage lexicon — four tiers
metric_value: Online (Transactional Processing); Midline (Fixed Content); Nearline (Disk Backup and Staging); Offline (Tape Archive)
notes: Four-tier framework; Online and Midline = Active Content; Nearline and Offline = Fixed Content

metric_name: Midline storage as new enterprise storage category

metric_value: By 2006 Warner Bros running multi-tiered FC/SATA/tape environment; Wikibon 2011 estimated SATA holds 85% of enterprise data and 40% of spend by 2015
